title: ariocarpus retusus subsp. trigonus
intro: Ariocarpus retusus subsp. trigonus, also known as the trigonus pygmy pincushion cactus, is a rare and unique species of cactus found in Mexico. The plant's medicinal properties include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Ariocarpus retusus subsp. trigonus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically to treat various skin conditions or internally to promote overall health and well-being.
